headline: Visa Expands Stablecoin Settlement As Investors Weigh Valuation Upside
summary: Visa is expanding USDC stablecoin settlement across multiple blockchain networks as part of its core payment infrastructure. The company is integrating on-chain analytics to monitor flows and provide business intelligence for global payment partners. These moves position stablecoins as a potential alternative to traditional correspondent banking settlements within Visa's network. Visa, NYSE:V, is taking its payment rails deeper into digital assets by bringing stablecoin settlement and...
